title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Paytm Money - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Paytm Money - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at Paytm Money are looking for an experienced Risk Analyst based out of Madurai. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Paytm Money:
Paytm Money is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Python for Finance

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Referral bonus program
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Paytm Money!
